failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch invocation: it omitted the required item_id and replaced the string product_id "1656367028" with numeric 0.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to determine whether item 1151293680 for product 1656367028 has backlight=RGB. The required IDs were available from index 1. At index 2, the Researcher prepared a ProductCatalogSearch call with {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using the wrong product_id value/type. The tool then explicitly rejected this as a SchemaError at index 3. This is a malformed tool invocation, not a misunderstanding of the goal or a system/access failure.
